title: limnosciadium pinnatum
intro: Limnosciadium pinnatum, also known as water celery, is a type of aquatic plant native to Europe and Asia. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory compounds. The plant is also known to have various health benefits, including reducing fever and alleviating symptoms of gastrointestinal disorders. In herbal preparations, Limnosciadium pinnatum is often used to make infusions, decoctions, and poultices to harness its medicinal properties.
